d: Lyca fires a comet-like arrow in a chosen direction, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within 5 tiles along its path and leaving Nebula Reflection for [[7]]s. The allies under Nebula Reflection summon meteors to deal extra damage equal to [[50%]] of their ATK to the target while using normal attacks.
Lyca bestows blessings of the stars, increasing all allies' ATK SPD by [[25]] for [[6]]s. This effect is triggered immediately when a battle starts and grants all allies [[120]] Energy.
Lyca summons meteors to attack all enemies, dealing [[100%]]<ATK> damage and reducing their Phys DEF by [[10%]] for [[5]]s.
Increases ATK SPD by [[21]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[27]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[33]] during battle.
Lyca summons meteors when a battle starts, directing them to attack targets with her normal attacks, dealing [[40%]]<ATK> physical damage.
Shoots an aerolite at a shielded enemy, dealing [[350%]]<ATK> damage. If the shield breaks, the target is stunned for [[4]]s. Only 1 aerolite can be shot every [[10]]s.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 15 ATK SPD, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: Lyca reduces the target's Phys DEF by [[25%]] for [[6]]s if they are hit by Comet Archery.

Lyca gains [[300]] extra Initial Energy. She extends the duration of Nebula Reflection from her Comet Archery by [[7]]s and makes each meteor summoned by allied attacks deal extra damage equal to [[40%]]<ATK> of her ATK.
